rejected_candidates.title: Unbounded `_excluded` iteration lets the owner gas-brick core token operations
rejected_candidates.reason: The loop is real, but exploitation requires a long sequence of deliberate owner-only `excludeAccount()` calls. This is privileged self-griefing rather than an intrinsic or permissionless protocol vulnerability, so it is not kept as a reportable issue.
